arts.ttl: Preview: Middlesbrough vs. Millwall - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Middlesbrough and Millwall, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Anfernee Dijksteel's Middlesrough contract situation dilemma after uplifting season - Boro panel
arts.sum: Our panel this week consists of Youtuber and talkSport journalist Phil Spencer, Boro Breakdown co-host Dana Malt, Boropolis co-founder Chris Cassidy and Twe12th Man member John Donovan. Anfernee Dijksteel is enjoying a season of career renaissance at Middlesbrough this term, having looked so likely to leave the club in the summer.

arts.ttl: More Middlesbrough illness woe ahead of Millwall as Aidan Morris return timeframe hope set
arts.sum: “We’ve still got a bit of illness knocking about the place actually,” Carrick said when asked for a fitness update ahead of Millwall. Middlesbrough face an anxious wait ahead of Saturday to see whether key players Dael Fry and Riley McGree will be available to play against Millwall, with the pair the latest to succumb to Boro ’s illness woe.
